hero_topics.title: AI Agents: Frontier Models
hero_topics.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5 A new class of intelligence for real work and powering agents, built to understand complex goals, use tools, check its work, and carry more tasks through to completion. ([Introducing GPT-5.5 A new class of intelligence for real work and powering agents, built to understand complex goals,...](https://x.com/openai/status/2047376561205325845)) Access GPT Image 2.0 natively in Hermes Agent Update now to get access - just run `hermes update` and select your image generation tool model with `hermes tools`. ([Access GPT Image 2.0 natively in Hermes Agent Update now to get access - just run hermes update and select your ima...](https://x.com/nousresearch/status/2046693872773062834)) GPT-5.5 is now accessible in Hermes Agent through the ChatGPT/Codex OAuth provider. Run `hermes update` to access now or learn how to get started with Hermes Agent here. ([GPT-5.5 is now accessible in Hermes Agent through the ChatGPT/Codex OAuth provider. Run hermes update to access now...](https://x.com/teknium/status/2047419336537846193)) Additional coverage spans 5 more items.
hero_topics.insight: This matters because model updates and official evaluations reset expectations for what agent stacks can attempt, while also creating new operating and safety assumptions. The multi-source signal is worth tracking for changes in capability, deployment friction, or operating risk.

hero_topics.title: Generative 3D Worlds: Interactive 3D Worlds
hero_topics.summary: Rapid 3D scene generation from text or images. ([Rapid 3D scene generation from text or images](https://x.com/tom_doerr/status/2046695380625023176))
hero_topics.insight: This matters because world-generation systems are moving from rendered clips toward persistent spaces that can be explored, edited, and exported into production tools. The single-source signal is worth tracking for signs that 3D asset creation and simulation workflows are becoming model-driven.
